auth.title: Welcome
auth.subtitle: Join your favorite shops. Collect stamps. Earn rewards.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

roleSelect.title: How will you use the app?

scan.aim: Point the camera at the customer's QR code

errors.qr_expired: QR code expired — ask the customer to generate a new one
errors.duplicate_scan: This customer was already stamped less than 5 seconds ago
errors.reward_already_used: This reward has already been redeemed
